title: Best Hotels in Trang Thailand (2026)
meta_description: The Trang hotels that actually help plan the stay: strong city bases, one edited island overnight, and one deliberate forest-side resort backed by official hotel sites.
intro: Trang hotel choice gets easier once you separate three different trips: a city-first stay in town, an island overnight on Koh Mook, or a nature-led stay near Khao Chong. The better shortlist favors official property pages and hotels that support one of those shapes cleanly instead of padding the city page with random scrape inventory.

items.name: Thumrin Hotel
items.description: The strongest practical city base when you want station-side convenience, direct-site booking support, and a simple setup for breakfast, old-town, and onward transport planning.
insider_tips: Best for city-first trips where breakfast and short day trips matter more than resort time.
items.current_info: The official Thumrin Hotel site still positions the property near Trang Railway Station and highlights complimentary Wi-Fi and parking.

items.name: Rua Rasada Hotel
items.description: A larger full-service city hotel when meetings, bigger facilities, or easier airport and station transfers matter more than being in the old-town walkable core.
insider_tips: A better fit for car-based or airport-linked stays than for pure old-town walking.
items.current_info: Rua Rasada's direct site still markets the hotel as a larger Trang base with practical transfer access between the airport, bus terminal, and station.

items.name: HOP INN Trang
items.description: The most predictable budget-chain option if the room is mainly a clean, uncomplicated short-stay base in Trang.
insider_tips: Best when you want a simple sleep-and-go city room rather than a hotel-led experience.
items.current_info: The official HOP INN Trang page still presents it as a straightforward budget hotel in Trang.

items.name: Koh Mook Sivalai Beach Resort
items.description: The cleanest edited island overnight if Koh Mook and Emerald Cave are central to the trip rather than an afterthought.
highlights: Best island overnight for Koh Mook
insider_tips: Use this only when an island overnight is intentional; it is not the right default for a city-first Trang stay.
items.current_info: The resort's official site still positions Koh Mook Sivalai Beach Resort directly on Koh Mook's beachfront peninsula.

items.name: Kachonghills Tented Resort
items.description: The best forest-side stay when you want a deliberate nature overnight near the Khao Chong side rather than another interchangeable city hotel.
insider_tips: This works only when the forest and resort setting are part of the plan; otherwise town is the smarter base.
items.current_info: Kachonghills' official site still positions the resort as a glamping-style nature destination in Trang.
